---
title: "Timeline of Hurricanes"
author: "Connor Whalen"
date: "2025-07-20"
output:
  word_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: '3'
  html_document:
    theme: readable
    highlight: textmate
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

Load packages
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ghibli)
library(tidyverse)
```


Load dataframe
```{r}
df <- read.csv("datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, enso_event, enso_strength) %>% 
  filter(!type %in% c("6 month", "3 month"))

```

Make timeline.
```{r}

ggplot(df, 
       aes(x = start_date, xend = end_date, y = type, yend = type, color = type)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 1) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 years", date_labels = "%Y") +
  labs(title = "Timeline of Event Types",
       x = "Date",
       y = "Event Type") +
  theme_minimal()

```
